task.objective: Complete the existing static-input packet builder as a usable local CLI that reads a JSON input file and writes deterministic evidence packet JSON to stdout or a file, with validation, examples, tests, and documentation for Proofrail AI PR Evidence Gate v0.1.

forbidden: modification of existing Machine Task Contracts
target repository code or command execution
adapter, API, MCP, web, GitHub App, SARIF, or other delivery surface implementation
product readiness or trusted release claims

requirements: Add GATE-V01-001 as the first commit on the work branch.
Preserve the existing buildEvidencePacket(input) behavior and compatibility.
Add a local CLI supporting pnpm evidence-gate --input <input.json>.
When --output <packet.json> is supplied, write the packet to that file.
When --output is absent, write the packet JSON to stdout.
Successful output is canonical and deterministic and ends with exactly one newline.
The CLI exits with code 0 on success.
JSON syntax and input-shape errors produce readable stderr output and a non-zero exit code.
Error messages do not disclose complete secret-like values from the input file.
The packet keeps claims, observedEvidence, missingEvidence, scope, reviewNeeds, and boundaries separate.
A Claim is not promoted to Evidence by itself.
Missing evidence is not converted into confidence or success state.
Identically normalized inputs produce byte-identical JSON output.
Provide example input JSON and expected output JSON under examples/evidence-gate/.
Provide tests for malformed JSON, invalid shape, deterministic output, stdout, output file, missing evidence, scope violation, and readiness overclaim prevention.
Use only Node standard-library behavior without adding dependencies or changing the lockfile.
Provide root commands equivalent to pnpm evidence-gate, pnpm evidence-gate:demo, and pnpm test:evidence-gate.
Include evidence-gate tests in pnpm verify.
Provide a README path that a new user can run within three minutes.
Record v0.1 implementation status and explicit non-goals in the active Phase 2 plan.
Record only commands actually run in validation evidence.
Do not claim product readiness, trusted release, or an authoritative Proofrail product Verdict.

requiredInvariants: The existing buildEvidencePacket(input) interface and behavior remain compatible.
Claims remain distinct from observed evidence and missing evidence remains explicit.
Identically normalized inputs produce byte-identical JSON output with one trailing newline.
No external dependency or lockfile change is introduced.
No live repository inspection, target-code execution, delivery surface, model provider, or Inference Zone behavior is implemented.
No product semantic, canonical terminology, Verdict, Trust, or Evidence authority change is introduced.
No product readiness, trusted release, or authoritative Proofrail product Verdict is claimed.

stopConditions: An external dependency or lockfile change is required
Live GitHub or repository collection is required
Target repository command execution is required
Canonical terminology, Verdict, Trust, Evidence authority, or product semantics must change
API keys, credits, billing, paid cloud, or SaaS are required: BLOCKED_COST_RISK
Codex usage limit is reached: LIMIT_REACHED
An existing test exposes a product defect that cannot be resolved without an out-of-scope change: BLOCKED_SCOPE
